+# zed-ros2-interfaces

data.author: thandal
data.message:
Update PosTrackStatus.msg

Fix typo in enum for SEARCHING_FLOOR_PLANE

files.patch:
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@ uint8 SEARCHING=0
 uint8 OK = 1
 uint8 OFF = 2
 uint8 FPS_TOO_LOW = 3
-uint8 SEARCHING_FLOOR_PLANE = 3
+uint8 SEARCHING_FLOOR_PLANE = 4
 
 # Status
-uint8 status
\ No newline at end of file
+uint8 status
